title: 392-Year-Old Bonsai Tree That Survived the Hiroshima Atomic Blast (2024)
abstract: Imagine a tree surviving not just decades, but centuries – this 392-year-old bonsai defied the atomic blast of Hiroshima. Witness its resilience and witness history in one fascinating tale. Join us to see how life prevails!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也想象过，一棵树能活到哪年？这棵392岁的盆景竟然在广岛原爆中幸存下来！它不仅见证了历史的残酷，还用自己顽强的生命力告诉你，活着就是奇迹。快来围观吧！
